title: Healthy Meal Finder
summary: Finds a meal that satisfies basic nutrition, distance, budget, and restaurant quality constraints before preparing a cart candidate.

inputs.name: query
inputs.description: Cuisine or dish seed used to search candidate restaurants.

inputs.name: maxDistanceKm
inputs.description: Upper delivery radius allowed for restaurant selection.

inputs.name: minProteinGrams
inputs.description: Minimum protein target for the selected meal.

inputs.name: maxBudget
inputs.description: Optional total budget cap for the order.

steps.title: Capture meal constraints
steps.description: Collect cuisine, protein, budget, rating, and distance constraints.

steps.title: Search nearby restaurants
steps.description: Discover candidate restaurants from the Swiggy MCP tool surface.

steps.title: Inspect restaurant menus
steps.description: Review menu items for each shortlisted restaurant and estimate nutrition fit.

steps.title: Rank valid meal combinations
steps.description: Filter by protein, budget, distance, and rating, then rank remaining combinations.

steps.title: Prepare a draft cart
steps.description: Write the chosen meal into the cart for review before checkout.

steps.title: Review cart summary
steps.description: Read back the cart summary for confirmation.

guarantees: Keeps tool calls within the existing Swiggy MCP surface.
Makes constraint handling explicit before cart mutation.
limitations: Needs menu-level nutrition data or reliable proxies to score protein accurately.
Does not place the final order automatically in the current implementation.
